title: garcinia verrucosa subsp. orientalis
intro: Garcinia verrucosa subsp. orientalis is a plant species within the Garcinia genus, commonly known as a type of mangosteen or Garcinia fruit tree. The plant has been reported to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Garcinia verrucosa subsp. orientalis are believed to include weight management, cholesterol reduction, and improved glucose metabolism, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
